Create the two bitHuman GitHub Apps

Click each button once. GitHub will show you a confirmation page (app name, permissions, events) — click Create GitHub App there.

The button POSTs the JSON at .github/app-manifests/bithuman-ci.json / bithuman-deps.json to GitHub. After creation: generate a private key, note the App ID, install the app on bithuman-product/bithuman-python-sdk and bithuman-product/bithuman-examples, then add the secrets listed in SETUP-BOTS.md.
